$comment: Always-loaded agent-doc budget RATCHET (tempdoc 620 Move 3). Every session loads CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules/*.md unconditionally; this caps that context. Each file's size must stay <= its ceiling, and the ceiling only ratchets DOWN: run `node scripts/ci/check-always-loaded-budget.mjs --rebalance` after content migrates out (Moves 1/2: generation, the consult-register, skill/doc relocation) to shrink the ceiling to the new size. A net-new always-loaded addition that regrows a file past its ceiling fails the check — UNLESS the growth is justified and declared via `node scripts/ci/check-always-loaded-budget.mjs --bump <file> --reason "<why>"`, which raises that ceiling to current size and records the reason in `bumps` (tempdoc 618 §13: an explicit, auditable raise, not silent ceiling surgery). ~tokens = bytes/4. Wiring: run pre-merge (manual now); fold into the prose-tier-register gate or verifyGovernanceGates once the doc set stabilizes (582 R3: extend the proven meta-gate, do NOT author a new kernel gate).

bumps.reason: 618 Seam C: log-pre-existing-issues rule now points at note-observation.mjs (per-session inbox shard) instead of echo>>observations.md
618 Seam C: shared-main inbox note documents note-observation.mjs + fold-observations.mjs
618 Phase 2 promotion: §10a piped-exit + §11d background-server platform bullets + 3 named-principle handles (unreachable-seed-green, subset-isnt-the-suite, green-masked-destructive)
